calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Shauna Matlin, Esq., for the Plaintiff MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA.
Kristin Messer, Esq., Eviction Defense Collaborative appearing for Defendant Christine Shozawa. Defendant Christine Shozawa not present in court.
Stephanie Andrew sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff Mercy Housing California and against defendant Christine Shozawa as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises The Arlington located at 480 Ellis Street, San Francisco, CA 94102.
Damages $520.75
Costs $300.00
for a Total Judgment of $820.75
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Mercy Housing California is present. Represented by Lucinda Haas.
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Christine Shozawa is present.
Attorney, Kimberly A. Millington is representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elam Lambert, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of November 25, 2013 remains on calendar.
